customManagers.description: Keep manifest.json requirements in sync with requirements.txt via PyPI
Track Python version in pyproject.toml requires-python

packageRules.description: Home Assistant version should match the homeassistant key in hacs.json
Python version is manually managed to track Home Assistant requirements
prBodyNotes: Do not automerge. This project tracks the Home Assistant Python requirement, which is the previous minor version of Python. Verify the new version matches before merging.

packageRules.description: Group developer tooling updates into a single PR
